description: Validate a form-fields JSON for geometry problems: overlapping label/entry bounding boxes (same page) and entry boxes too short for their text. Pure Python stdlib — no PDF library.
rules: read-only — consumes a fields JSON, writes a text report
reports FAILURE per intersection or short entry box; SUCCESS if all valid
aborts after 20 messages to keep the report bounded
stdlib only (json, dataclasses) — runs fully offline
usage: Set FIELDS_JSON (a JSON with a form_fields array, each having label_bounding_box, entry_bounding_box, page_number, description). Output: check_boxes.txt.
limitation: Validates geometry described in the JSON only; it never opens the PDF itself.
